channel.title: Nicotine Science and Policy
channel.description: Daily digest of views, debates and discussions on nicotine science, policy, regulation and advocacy.

item.title: Tobacco Harm Reduction Debate Grows Across Europe
item.description: Europe has a chance to stop treating harm reduction as a threat and start treating it as a public health tool. Millions of adults still smoke, and many will not quit through traditional routes alone. Lower-risk nicotine products can help close that gap if regulation is guided by evidence rather than suspicion. The EU’s tobacco policy should focus on reducing disease, not preserving an outdated divide between approved quitting and practical switching. (Published on July 20, 2026bybrusselsmorning.com)
